title: Black hole (disambiguation)
content:
'''Black hole''' refers to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Black hole]]''', the astrophysical phenomenon
*The '''[[Black Hole Gang]]''', a [[pirate]] organization that operated out of the [[Delphon system]]

==Legends==
===Black holes===
*'''[[Black hole/Legends|Black hole]]''', the astrophysical phenomenon.
*'''[[Galactic Center]]''', the black hole at the center of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
*'''[[Black Hole of Nakat/Legends|Black Hole of Nakat]]'''
*'''[[Black Hole of Quintas/Legends|Black Hole of Quintas]]'''
*The '''[[Unidentified black hole|black hole]]''' that was the namesake of the Black Hole sector
===Locations===
*'''[[Black Hole (Corellia)|Black Hole]]''', a [[Hypermatter/Legends|hypermatter]] facility on the planet [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].
*'''[[Black Hole (Fhost)|Black Hole]]''', a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on the planet [[Fhost]].
*'''[[Black Hole (Kiffex)|Black Hole]]''', a cantina on the planet [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]].
*'''[[Black Hole (Vergesso Base)|Black Hole]]''', a bar in [[Vergesso Base]]
*'''[[Black Hole (cantina)|Black Hole]]''', a cantina in [[Doom City]] (non-canon appearance)
*'''[[The Black Hole]]''', a region of the [[Off-Worlders' Quarter]] on [[Ropagi II]]
*The '''[[Black Hole sector]]''', a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] near the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]]
===Organizations===
*The '''[[Black Hole Gang/Legends|Black Hole Gang]]''', a pirate organization.
*The '''[[Black Hole Team]]''', a group of research scientists
===Other===
*'''[[Black Hole (drug)|Black Hole]]''', a hallucinogen employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
*'''[[Black Hole-class Salvage Dreadnought|''Black Hole''-class Salvage Dreadnought]]''', a class of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used by the [[Ugor/Legends|Ugors]].
*'''[[Black Hole dark trooper]]''', a class of [[Dark Trooper/Legends|Dark Trooper]].
*'''[[Black hole pepper]]''', a kind of seasoning
*The codename '''[[Blackhole]]''', held by two individuals:
**'''Lord [[Cronal]]''', an [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] and former [[Director of Imperial Intelligence]], and the first known holder of the title.
**'''[[Grand Vizier/Legends|Grand Vizier]] [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]]''', who was rumored to have adopted the codename Blackhole as well as Cronal's identity after the latter's presumed death at the Battle of Mindor.
*'''[[Code black hole]]'''

{{Disambig}}

|es=Agujero negro (desambiguación)
}}
